policy.rationale: Pull ONLY the core-logic subtrees of each upstream repo (no docs, tests, web assets, node_modules) so the ECONITH tree stays lean. Every vendor is pinned to an immutable commit and never imported directly into main.py — access is mediated exclusively through bridges/vendor_shims.py.
policy.import_rule: NEVER import a vendor package outside an econith_* shim. Runtime code depends on the shim contract, not the vendor.
policy.execution_authority_rule: No shim may publish 'order.intent' and no shim may subscribe with domain=QUANT. Alpha/routing/consensus shims emit only advisory topics; the Sentinel-gated AIBridge is the sole producer of order.intent, keeping Sentinel's veto absolute.
policy.mode_rule: Shims marked simulation_only refuse to emit while the process is in REALITY (defense-in-depth on top of the EventBus mode gate).
lightweight_units: collectors/ MUST NOT gain a hard dependency on any vendor SDK; it may only call an econith_* shim that degrades gracefully when the vendor is absent.

vendors.name: openbb
vendors.license_note: AGPL — review distribution terms before shipping binaries. Shim keeps the surface REST/SDK-optional.

vendors.name: nofx
vendors.sparse_note: Adjust to upstream layout after first pull; keep only the routing/policy core.
vendors.invariant_note: Emits an ADVISORY routing plan only. The Sentinel-gated AIBridge remains the sole producer of order.intent.

vendors.name: trading_agents
vendors.invariant_note: Advisory consensus only; never publishes order.intent, never claims DOMAIN_QUANT.

vendors.name: ai_hedge_fund
vendors.invariant_note: Emits an ADVISORY alpha candidate folded by the Predictor; the single ai.signal producer is unchanged.

vendors.name: zipline_reloaded
vendors.invariant_note: Offline friction provider — no bus emission; used inside the backtest engine.

vendors.name: mesa
vendors.invariant_note: Deterministic single step per TickPipeline PHASE 4 — no independent scheduler thread on the EventBus.

vendors.name: abides
vendors.sparse_note: Older repo layouts may expose 'abides'/'util' — re-point after first pull.
vendors.invariant_note: SIMULATION-only synthetic LOB. Never binds live sockets; refuses to run in REALITY.
